MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Loretta Najera. Steven Williams, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Anthony W. Belmonte and Defendant, James Crowley, Esq. appeared in pro per. The matter settled per written stipulation which is read into the record.
